title: Development banks must power innovation – without breaking the market [Promoted Content]
summary_full: Europe’s technological competitiveness depends on strategic public investment working alongside private capital. Development banks must catalyse innovation, accelerate startup and scaleup growth, strengthening investment ecosystems without crowding out private money.
